mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.`쉼표번호`, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.is_anonymous AS anonymous, p.status, p.created_at, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '익명' ELSE u.nickname END AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.status = 'visible') AS comment_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl2 WHERE pl2.post_id = p.id AND pl2.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}) > 0
0
AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE p.status = 'visible'
AND p.category = #{category}
ORDER BY like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.`쉼표번호`, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.is_anonymous AS anonymous, p.status, p.created_at, CASE WHEN p.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '익명' ELSE u.nickname END AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.status = 'visible') AS comment_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl2 WHERE pl2.post_id = p.id AND pl2.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}) > 0
0
AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status != 'deleted'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (`쉼표번호`, category, title, content, is_anonymous, status) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{anonymous}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id} AND `쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND `쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND `쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.`쉼표번호`, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.is_anonymous AS anonymous, p.status, p.created_at, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, 0 AS liked_by_me FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
